result:
The task has been successfully completed. The output file 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' containing the derived variable 'alcfst' (earliest age of alcohol consumption) has been created. The file includes:

1. NSID: Cohort member identifier
2. alcfst: Factor variable with levels for ages 14, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20, 25, 32, 99 (Never had alcohol), and -8 (Don't know/insufficient information)

The script processed all available waves of data and applied the special rules for determining alcohol consumption, including the special rule for age 14 requiring both 'ever had alcohol' and 'had alcoholic drink in last 12 months' to be positive.
